## Scope

## Definition of Done

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes with zero errors
- [ ] `pnpm biome check .` passes with zero errors
- [ ] Behavior changes are described in the commit message
- [ ] If a spec assumption was wrong, the relevant doc is updated in this PR
- [ ] Manual smoke test passed (see the test matrix in `docs/SPEC.md`)
- [ ] No secrets committed or logged (`COINSTATS_API_KEY`, tokens, live Worker URL)
